nl: // Sender emits heartbeat periodically with a timeout guard. // Monitor can timeout if no heartbeat arrives, triggering alarm event which sets a flag. // assert system deadlock free. // assert alarm state is reachable via flag variable.

// Process sets a shared variable, waits Delta time units via tick then Wait, then checks the variable with a guarded choice in a helper sub-process. // CRITICAL: after Wait[n] use semicolon then call a helper process — do NOT chain Wait[n] -> directly. Data operations need a tick before Wait.
// Task must finish within 4 time units, otherwise fallback executes. // assert system deadlock free.
// Light turns on, stays on for a bounded time, then turns off. // assert system deadlock free.

// Traffic light cycles through green, yellow, red phases with defined durations. // Use Wait[n] for timing with semicolons between phases. // Data operation {phase = N;} -> tick -> Wait[duration]; next_phase -> ... // assert deadlock free and green always eventually occurs (LTL liveness).

// Elevator door opens for 8 time units, then starts closing. // If button pressed during closing, door reopens. // Use tick -> Wait[n]; helper_process pattern. // Guarded [buttonPressed] vs [!buttonPressed] selects close or reopen. // assert deadlock free.

// Two nodes share a channel with carrier sensing. // Each listens, if idle transmits 3 ticks then releases. // If busy backs off (2 ticks for Node0, 4 for Node1). // Guarded choice [medium == IDLE] vs [medium != IDLE]. // Different backoff times break symmetry. // assert deadlock free.

// Fischer protocol with 4 processes sharing a variable for mutual exclusion. // Each sets x=i, waits 3 ticks, checks if x==i to enter CS. // If x changed, retries. // Guarded [x == Idle] for write, [x == i] for CS entry. // assert deadlock free and mutex (counter <= 1) always holds.
Fischer protocol (OFFICIAL PAT RTS manual pattern). Uses ifb blocking conditional, Wait[Epsilon] within[Delta]. assert deadlockfree + mutex (counter <= 1 always).
